tweets.text:
Based on the API vs EIA running error, API was supposed to be more BEARISH than EIA on crude for this week.

Because API reported -8.33 million bbls, EIA will report between -9 to -10 million bbls.

SPR release of 8.9 million bbls.

Total crude draw of 17.9 to 18.9 million bbls, or the largest crude draw in history.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
API Inventory Moves 06/16

Crude -8.33 million (exp. -4.5 million)
Gasoline +2.479
Distillates
Cushing 

SPR actual -8.9 million (lowest levels since.... 1983)
#oott #crudeoil #gasoline #API
tweets.full_text:
Based on the API vs EIA running error, API was supposed to be more BEARISH than EIA on crude for this week.

Because API reported -8.33 million bbls, EIA will report between -9 to -10 million bbls.

SPR release of 8.9 million bbls.

Total crude draw of 17.9 to 18.9 million bbls, or the largest crude draw in history.
